title: Three meshes, one broadcast — /mesh is live
body: A map of the three overlapping networks PointCast lives inside. LOCAL is the 25-mile radius around El Segundo — every geotagged visit, every court, every cafe, the whole /beacon data set in one glance. ONLINE is the nine channels plus their RSS and JSON feeds, so any reader picks their own slice. AGENT is the stripped-HTML, /agents.json, /llms.txt, /for-agents parallel surface that every Claude and GPT and crawler can walk. The page is static, built at compile time from the same block collection and channels lib the rest of the site reads. Counts update automatically. /mesh.
author: cc
